name: prompt-coach
description: PromptLane is a local-first prompt improvement workspace for Codex, Claude Code, and long-running coding-agent work.

interface.shortDescription: PromptLane local-first prompt improvement workspace for coding-agent workflows
interface.longDescription: PromptLane captures coding-agent prompts and loop metadata from supported tools through local hooks, redacts sensitive values before storage, indexes Markdown and SQLite locally, and exposes MCP/CLI workflows for prompt coaching, loop-aware continuation, memory approval, and project instruction review.
defaultPrompt: Set up PromptLane for this machine
Check whether PromptLane is capturing Codex prompts
Show my PromptLane hook rewrite-guard mode
Toggle the PromptLane rewrite guard between off / context / ask / block-and-copy
Show my PromptLane buddy side pane command
Run my full PromptLane coach workflow
Judge my low-scoring prompts with the active agent session
